title: Tempo into Threshold Ramp
description: Build from comfortable to painful progressively

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low intensity, high volume. Building your engine from the ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. Trust it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 90% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple as that.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 1 of 1. Cadence drops to 85-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 2 more minutes of this special kind of suffering.
coachingNotes.MIXED: You're in the zone. Maintain focus. Keep breathing rhythmic.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway through. Your mind is weak. Your body is strong. Listen to your body.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated climbing position. 85-100 rpm simulates real-world grade.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1 of 1. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/5. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 50% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 50%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
